content: *꾸러미, 일반* {color="gray"} --- **무게:** 22 lbs **가치:** 40 GP --- 학자의 꾸러미는 다음 아이템을 포함합니다: [배낭](/212f7f5a1e808113a699d64caf25e4ab?pvs=25), [책](/212f7f5a1e8081169a8eff0e85099146?pvs=25), [잉크](/212f7f5a1e80813e86bcd5970785c828?pvs=25), [잉크 펜](/212f7f5a1e808169b206ce647700482f?pvs=25), [램프](/212f7f5a1e808167aee5c154cbb6561f?pvs=25), 10병의 [기름](/212f7f5a1e8081959762fb1471be0875?pvs=25), 10장의 [양피지](/212f7f5a1e8081aa8340e1a781812e1a?pvs=25), [부싯깃통](/212f7f5a1e80813da4afc2be9884e5a6?pvs=25).
